ogTitle: Pyramid Hill vs Quambatook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pyramid Hill and Quambatook.
heading: Pyramid Hill vs Quambatook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pyramid Hill, Victoria and Quambatook, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Quambatook has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Pyramid Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pyramid Hill or Quambatook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pyramid Hill has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Quambatook scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pyramid Hill scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Quambatook scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pyramid Hill or Quambatook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Quambatook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
